mapper.select: SELECT p.POLL_ID , p.WS_ID , p.TITLE , p.REGIST_DT , c.CANDIDATE_ID , c.START_DT , c.END_DT , COUNT(v.USER_ID) AS VOTE_COUNT , IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN v.USER_ID = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS VOTED_BY_ME FROM SCHEDULE_POLL p LEFT JOIN SCHEDULE_POLL_CANDIDATE c ON c.POLL_ID = p.POLL_ID LEFT JOIN SCHEDULE_POLL_VOTE v ON v.CANDIDATE_ID = c.CANDIDATE_ID WHERE p.WS_ID = #{workspaceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND p.PLANNER_ID = #{plannerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY p.POLL_ID, p.WS_ID, p.TITLE, p.REGIST_DT, c.CANDIDATE_ID, c.START_DT, c.END_DT ORDER BY p.REGIST_DT DESC, c.START_DT ASC

SELECT p.POLL_ID , p.WS_ID , p.TITLE , p.REGIST_DT , c.CANDIDATE_ID , c.START_DT , c.END_DT , COUNT(v.USER_ID) AS VOTE_COUNT , IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN v.USER_ID = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS VOTED_BY_ME FROM SCHEDULE_POLL p LEFT JOIN SCHEDULE_POLL_CANDIDATE c ON c.POLL_ID = p.POLL_ID LEFT JOIN SCHEDULE_POLL_VOTE v ON v.CANDIDATE_ID = c.CANDIDATE_ID WHERE p.POLL_ID = #{pollId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY p.POLL_ID, p.WS_ID, p.TITLE, p.REGIST_DT, c.CANDIDATE_ID, c.START_DT, c.END_DT ORDER BY c.START_DT ASC

SELECT c.START_DT , c.END_DT , COUNT(v.USER_ID) AS VOTE_COUNT FROM SCHEDULE_POLL p JOIN SCHEDULE_POLL_CANDIDATE c ON c.POLL_ID = p.POLL_ID LEFT JOIN SCHEDULE_POLL_VOTE v ON v.CANDIDATE_ID = c.CANDIDATE_ID WHERE p.WS_ID = #{workspaceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND p.PLANNER_ID = #{plannerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY c.START_DT, c.END_DT ORDER BY VOTE_COUNT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCHEDULE_POLL ( POLL_ID , WS_ID , PLANNER_ID , TITLE , IS_ANONYMOUS , REGIST_DT , REGIST_ID) VALUES ( #{pollId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{wsId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{plannerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 'Y' , NOW() , #{registId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
